MARISSA CHEN
VP Product & Growth — consumer marketplaces
EXPERIENCE
VP Product — Zalora Group | Singapore | Mar 2020 – Present
• Own product strategy and roadmap for a fashion marketplace serving 14 markets across Southeast Asia
• Grew GMV 3.4x in three years by rebuilding search ranking and launching a loyalty wallet
• Run a 60-person org of product managers, designers and analysts; introduced quarterly OKR reviews
• Scaled the experimentation program to 200 concurrent A/B tests with a central stats service
Head of Product — Grab | Singapore | Jan 2016 – Feb 2020
• Shipped GrabFood subscriptions, adding 1.8M paying members in the first year
• Led the cross-functional fraud taskforce that cut promo abuse losses 41%
• Negotiated a map-data partnership reducing routing complaints by a third
• Hired and coached eleven product managers across Jakarta, Manila and Ho Chi Minh City offices
Senior Product Manager — Yahoo | Sunnyvale, USA | Jul 2011 – Dec 2015
• Relaunched Yahoo Mail mobile apps to a 4.5-star rating and 23M daily active users
• Drove homepage personalization that lifted click-through 17%
• Managed the migration of mail search onto a unified ranking platform shared with news and sports verticals
EDUCATION
MBA, Strategy — INSEAD, Fontainebleau | 2010 – 2011
B.S. Computer Science — Stanford University | 2003 – 2007
LIFE PHILOSOPHY
I would rather ship ten imperfect experiments than one perfect plan; users vote with their thumbs. Hiring kind, curious people beats hiring credentialed ones.
MOST PROUD OF
 Keynote speaker at Web Summit 2023 on marketplace trust
 Two patents on ranking personalization filed at Yahoo
 Angel portfolio of nine Southeast Asian startups with two exits
